---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Gnosys
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem you're trying to solve

What are you trying to do that Gnosys makes hard or impossible today?
Describe the situation, not just the feature.

## Proposed solution

What would you like Gnosys to do? Be as concrete as you can — a command
name, a flag, an MCP tool, a config option, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you've tried to solve this, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Examples, related tools, links, or mockups. If this is about a specific
agent/IDE integration, name it.
